executives.name: John Scannell
executives.background: Mr. Scannell is the Non-Executive Chairman of the Board. He served as Chief Executive Officer of Moog from 2011 to 2023 and Chairman from 2014 to 2023. He joined Moog in 1990.

board_of_directors.name: John Scannell
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Scannell is the Non-Executive Chairman of the Board. He served as Chief Executive Officer of Moog from 2011 to 2023 and Chairman from 2014 to 2023. He joined Moog in 1990.
